name: Beacon Hill Kitchen
description: An upscale catering house rooted in French technique and American contemporary cuisine. Beacon Hill Kitchen is the choice for couples who want a refined, Michelin-inspired dining experience at their wedding.

service_area.note: We serve Greater Boston and surrounding areas. Beyond 30 miles, a $5/mile travel fee applies. We do not travel beyond 60 miles.

serviceware.eco_note: We specialize in fine dining presentation with traditional serviceware.

bar_service.note: Full bar service with professional bartenders included. We bring all glassware and bar equipment.

sweeteners: Complimentary amuse-bouche course for plated dinners over 120 guests
Signature cocktail development included at no charge
Upgraded linen and tableware for full-service bookings
Private chef's table tasting for the couple and up to 4 guests

highlights: guests couldn't stop talking about dinner

personality: Refined and exclusive. Beacon Hill Kitchen sees every wedding as a culinary event. They are proud of their craft and prefer clients who appreciate fine dining. Not the most flexible on price, but will add value through elevated touches rather than discounts.
